scripts.sync-env: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('.env')) { if (fs.existsSync('backend')) fs.copyFileSync('.env', 'backend/.env'); if (fs.existsSync('frontend')) fs.copyFileSync('.env', 'frontend/.env'); console.log('Env files synced to backend and frontend.'); } else { console.error('.env file not found at root!'); }"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && composer install --working-dir=backend
scripts.dev: npm run sync-env && concurrently --kill-others "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
